title: CapX1[ASMR Edition]
description: A resource/soundpack that makes Minecraft sound more satisfying or ASMR
body:
![ASMR](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OD26BnwS/images/e6b02e6a644adea569e26f71bce9550681a3d491.png)

✨**[Support Me!](https://patreon.com/CapTommy?utm_medium=unknown&utm_source=join_link&utm_campaign=creatorshare_creator&utm_content=copyLink)**✨



Ever wanted to make Minecraft sound more ASMR or satisfying?  Try CapX1 ASMR Edition!  It changes common Minecraft sounds, such as dig, step, break, hit and more to sound more ASMR!  It also changes a few Minecraft textures.  Enjoy!


I would really appreciate it if you credited me if you use it in a video, Thanks!

Updates are in the works! Follow the project to be notified about future updates!

![ASMR](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OD26BnwS/images/f2b4e7abf6694bb09e8a2f5e7d164515fbce1363.png)

**And More!**

<details>
<summary>Updates In The Works</summary>

More sounds :p

</details>
